parents.subject: LU-16399 tests: add subtests setup/cleanup records

commit.subject: LU-0000 test: ppc64le validation
commit.message:
LU-0000 test: ppc64le validation

ORNL needs to validate Lustre on ppc64le

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity \
    clientdistro=el8.6 clientarch=ppc64le
Change-Id: Icab5e337b7b64cef18f628bf2b576f8ad7a29ac2
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
